settings.description: Australian milled ﬂours and other speciality grains, farm fresh free-range eggs and seasonal produce all pasta, each piece unique. Our extensive assortment of sughetti and take-home meals are all prepared in house and ready to enjoy around

settings.text_heading: If there’s anything that unites people it’s a saucy bowl of spaghetti
